Document:
# Visitors
Visitors are humanoid Free Agents who arrive at the station by shuttle with their own equipment and backgrounds. They have no duty to Nanotrasen and are not assigned any antagonist objectives. What they do during the shift is largely their own choice.
Visitors are full humanoids with speech and the ability to interact with the station like any crew member.
## Variants
- [bold]Syndicate Disaster Victim[/bold]: a Syndicate-aligned civilian who has arrived on the station. Armed with basic Syndicate gear and part of the Syndicate faction, but has no specific orders. - [bold]Black Marketeer[/bold]: a visitor who arrived with goods to trade. Has no specific objectives beyond their own dealings. - [bold]Cossack[/bold]: a visitor who arrived with EVA gear. Speaks with a distinct accent produced by several layered speech quirks.
